criteria_verification.evidence: SystemDesignGraphiti class implemented with DESIGN_GROUP='project_design' and CONTRACTS_GROUP='api_contracts' constants. All 7 methods implemented: upsert_design_decision, upsert_api_contract, upsert_data_model, search_design_context(query, num_results=5), has_design_context(), get_design_decisions(), get_api_contracts(). Follows SystemPlanGraphiti pattern exactly - all use upsert_episode(), get_group_id(), graceful degradation, and [Graphiti] prefix logging. Thread-safe via no shared mutable state.

criteria_verification.evidence: DesignWriter class implemented with all 4 methods. write_ddr renders ddr.md.j2 to decisions/DDR-NNN.md, write_api_contract renders api-contract.md.j2 to contracts/API-{slug}.md, write_data_model generates markdown to models/DM-{slug}.md, write_component_diagram renders component-l3.md.j2 to diagrams/{slug}.md. All methods create directories with mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True). Templates updated to use correct variable names matching test expectations.
criteria_verification.notes: DesignWriter class implemented with all 4 methods. write_ddr renders ddr.md.j2 to decisions/DDR-NNN.md, write_api_contract renders api-contract.md.j2 to contracts/API-{slug}.md, write_data_model generates markdown to models/DM-{slug}.md, write_component_diagram renders component-l3.md.j2 to diagrams/{slug}.md. All methods create directories with mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True). Templates updated to use correct variable names matching test expectations.

criteria_verification.evidence: scan_next_ddr_number function implemented in design_writer.py. Scans for DDR-NNN.md files using regex pattern ^DDR-(\d{3})\.md$, returns max(N)+1 or 1 if no DDR files exist or directory doesn't exist. Tested with 5 tests covering empty dir, nonexistent dir, max number finding, ignoring non-DDR files, and handling gaps.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Integration test: create entities, write via DesignWriter, verify file output
criteria_verification.evidence: 3 integration tests in TestIntegration class: test_create_design_decision_and_write creates a DesignDecision and verifies DDR-001.md output with all expected sections, test_create_api_contract_and_write creates an ApiContract and verifies API-payment-gateway.md output, test_create_data_model_and_write creates a DataModel and verifies DM-inventory.md output. All verify file existence and content correctness.
